# EnteleWALLET Brand Assets

Official EnteleWALLET logos and banners for the website and GitHub repository.

## Files

| File | Use |
|------|-----|
| `entelewallet-logo-horizontal.png` | README banner (dark theme) |
| `entelewallet-logo-dark.png` | Website hero/header dark banner |
| `entelewallet-icon-512.png` | App icon, PWA, WalletConnect metadata |
| `social-preview.png` | GitHub social preview / Open Graph (1200×630) |

## Website paths

These assets are copied into the Next.js app:

- `apps/web/public/brand/entelewallet-logo-horizontal.png` (light background)
- `apps/web/public/brand/entelewallet-logo-dark.png` (dark background)
- `apps/web/public/brand/entelewallet-icon-512.png`
- `apps/web/public/icons/icon-192.png`, `icon-512.png`, `apple-touch-icon.png`
- `apps/web/public/og/entelewallet-lite-og.png`

## Tagline

**SECURE • INTELLIGENT • CONNECTED**

## GitHub social preview

Upload `.github/assets/social-preview.png` in the repository **Settings → General → Social preview** for link previews on GitHub and social platforms.
